'''Ansillivog''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ansillivog system/Legends|Ansillivog system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
Discovered during the [[Great Manifest Period/Legends|Great Manifest Period]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the world remained loyal to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for centuries.<ref name="TEA" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], upon the Republic's transformation into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Ansillivog pledged to follow [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] rule as [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Dermeg]] was appointed to the system.<ref name="RPG" /> Playing no role in galactic politics throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] or [[Imperial Civil War]], the world would eventually fall under control of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Surviving the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Ansillivog became a member of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]] of [[Darth Krayt]] circa [[137 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Ansillivog was created for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|second edition]] of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]], published in [[1992]]. It was later listed on a coordinates map in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
